strengths: Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure builder at re:cinq: currently shipping MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — exactly the kind of 'demonstrated products built with AI' the role prizes.
~20 years of engineering spanning web, mobile, desktop, embedded, cloud (AWS CDK), and real-time high-throughput systems, comfortably clearing the 15-year minimum with rare cross-domain breadth.

Serial founder (GISCollective, 2016–present) and prolific community educator (FOSS4G conference talk, full-day web internals workshop, multi-module Selenium course) — entrepreneurial drive and the 'inspire others internally and externally' mandate are already demonstrated habits, not aspirations.
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; education is a BS in Computer Science plus a fine-arts degree, leaving the preferred advanced AI credential unmet.

Deep AI-specific experience is concentrated in the current role (April 2025–present); a longer track record of AI platform leadership or customer advisory work would strengthen the case for a Director-level IC scope.
Titles across the career are Senior/Staff Developer rather than Principal or Distinguished Engineer, signalling a potential seniority gap relative to the role's Director-level IC expectations.
response.justification: Bogdan brings over two decades of polyglot engineering experience — from low-latency D-lang microservices handling millions of requests per second to cloud-native AWS CDK product work — and is actively building the AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) that sits at the core of this role's mandate. His founder track record with GISCollective and a consistent pattern of community knowledge-sharing (conference talks, multi-day workshops, open-source libraries) demonstrate exactly the entrepreneurial instinct and external influence the Principal Engineer position requires; the absence of a formal AI graduate degree is offset by current, demonstrable AI platform authorship.
